name: Bruce Vilanch
description: American comedy writer, head writer for the Oscars
abstract: Bruce Gerald Vilanch (born November 23, 1948) is an American comedy writer, songwriter, and actor. He is a two-time Emmy Award–winner.

concerts.label: Gay Men's Health Crisis Benefit: You Gotta Have Friends
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Janis Siegel
about_quotes.evidence: And Bruce Vilanch, who ended up writing for Bette Midler and for the Oscars... So those were our writers.
about_quotes.doc_title: Janis Siegel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 22, 2015
